name_en: Name: FENDI Mon Tresor Bucket Bag
name_cn:
Name: FENDI Mon Tresor Bucket Bag
Quality: Original Sample
Model: 8802
Color: Champagne
Size: 12*18*10cm
FENDI's latest masterpiece, featuring the standout vintage FF letter embossed print, which is the brand's most classic pattern. The exquisite bucket shape adds to its outstanding appeal, looking beautiful when worn. Based on authentic purchase patterns, original sample level, exquisite workmanship.
